overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a tribal settlement with wooden structures and autumn foliage, transitioning to ancient stone ruins perched on misty mountainsides. The clip begins on a dirt path near wooden fences, moves along waterfront docks with water wheels, then cuts to red rock canyon pathways with ancient pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal village outskirts with dirt path and wooden fences

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking steadily along a dirt path toward the village center, passing wooden fences and autumn trees

entered.detail: tall weathered wooden fence lining the right side of the path
trees with orange and yellow autumn foliage
unpaved dirt trail with patches of grass
large mountain peak visible in the background
abandoned wooden wagon on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks along a dirt path on the outskirts of a tribal settlement. Wooden fences line the right side while autumn trees with colorful foliage stand to the left. The path leads toward distant mountains and the village center ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden waterfront dock with tribal settlement across green water

events.description: transitioning from dirt path to wooden dock platform along the water's edge

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking along wooden dock platforms, surveying the tribal settlement and water wheels across the green water

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank walkway extending over green water
murky green water of the canal or lake
cluster of wooden tribal buildings with thatched roofs across the water
large wooden water wheel turning in the water near the settlement
arched stone bridge connecting parts of the settlement
large black iron pot with bubbling contents on the dock

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wooden dock extending over green water. Aloy walks along the planks, passing a large cooking cauldron, while observing the tribal settlement with water wheels and stone bridges across the water. Mountains rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone ruins on mountain cliffside with panoramic valley views

events.description: screen fades to black then transitions to red rock canyon with ancient ruins and stone pathways

agents.ego_description: Aloy traversing ancient stone pathways along cliff edges, passing carved stone pillars with misty mountains visible in the distance

entered.detail: ancient stone tile pathway with reddish hue winding along the cliff
tall carved stone columns with ornate designs lining the path
clouds and mist filling the valley below the cliff edge
low stone balustrades along the edge of the pathway
dramatic mountain peaks rising above the cloud layer

segments.scene_description: Following a transition, Aloy emerges in a red rock canyon with ancient stone ruins. She walks along elevated stone pathways lined with carved pillars, with misty valleys and dramatic mountain vistas visible below and in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey that begins in a colorful tribal settlement and ascends into the desolate heights of ancient stone ruins. It begins with Aloy walking along a dirt path flanked by wooden fences and vibrant autumn foliage, moving steadily toward the village center and distant peaks. As the terrain shifts, the camera follows her onto wooden docks extending over green water, passing a large cooking cauldron and water wheels that blend the settlement's architecture with the surrounding mountains. The scene then opens into a dramatic red rock canyon, where the wooden structures give way to elevated stone pathways and carved pillars. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal misty valleys and sweeping mountain vistas as she navigates the remnants of the ancient ruins.
